issues.statement: 根据客户会员等级提高告警服务的计费优先级。
issues.technical_gap: The statement defines commercial queue priority but no technical problem, processing mechanism, hardware interaction, controlled-object behavior, or technical effect.
issues.required_action: Keep the statement outside the protectable technical contribution and return to invention mining if the customer asserts an additional technical mechanism.

next_allowed_action: Continue only with the source-backed sensor-processing-control chain; do not draft the business rule as a technical contribution.
